name: shha_shhb_chr7_chr12
description: Zebrafish TGD ohnolog pair: sonic hedgehog a (sonic-you)/shhb (tiggywinkle) ohnologs; floor plate and limb patterning. These developmental regulators are retained in pairs after the teleost-specific whole-genome duplication because their dosage and tissue-specific expression are under strong selection (Force-Lynch DDC model, Lynch-Conery escape from adaptive conflict). CDS identity 80-92%, UTR identity often <50%.
